summary: Reviewed the main...impl/gap-011 changes and read the changed files. No runtime source or raw Bronze files are touched, and dashboard/progress docs are updated, but the report still has an evidence-scope overclaim and the evidence checker is too weak for the stated GAP-011 contract. I could not re-run local git/python commands because the sandbox denied launching those executables, so test judgments are from code inspection and committed evidence files.

findings.title: Report overstates news as part of the current reportable dataset
findings.why: The report says the current reportable dataset combines rail statistics and rail-news inputs, but the same change and existing evidence only prove a World Bank-backed stats Gold table; live Ollama/news extraction is explicitly not proven and tracked as GAP-006. This reads as claiming a combined stats+news dataset that does not exist, violating the GAP-011 honesty/no fabricated data contract.
findings.fix: Reword this sentence to say the project tracks statistics plus candidate news sources, while the current reportable Gold dataset is stats-only. Keep RSS/GDELT in the source coverage section as raw/fixture evidence and leave news features in Known Gaps until live extraction is proven.

findings.title: Evidence-link test does not guard presentation numbers or key/value correctness
findings.why: The DoD requires every numeric claim in both REPORT.md and PRESENTATION.md to match evidence artifacts, but the test only checks that selected value tokens appear somewhere in REPORT.md. It does not validate PRESENTATION.md numeric claims, does not check KSH/UIC/RSS/Statistik Austria/GDELT source-coverage values, and repeated values can satisfy the test under the wrong key or section.
findings.fix: Extend the checker to load every cited source manifest used for quantitative claims, assert exact key/value snippets or parse the Evidence Index rows by path+JSON key, and run the same validation against PRESENTATION.md so slide numbers cannot drift from the report/evidence.

contract_items_verified: Compared main to impl/gap-011 via repository compare: changed files are planning notes, docs, output/report, output/presentation, and tests/test_report_evidence_links.py; no src/ runtime code or raw Bronze files are changed.
GAP-011 deliverables exist under output/report/REPORT.md and output/presentation/PRESENTATION.md.
Report/presentation citations avoid direct output/evidence/**/bronze/ paths and cite committed manifests/counts/samples/Spark evidence instead.

Headline Gold, MinIO, and Spark figures in the report match committed evidence JSON inspected: Gold 2968x4, 151 geos, 1995-2021, AT/HU 27 rows each; MinIO roundtrip 32 bytes; Spark 4.1.2, input 2968x4, output 2968x5.
docs/GAP_REGISTER.md, docs/TASKS.md, docs/index.html, docs/VERIFICATION.md, docs/PROGRESS_LOG.md, and .planning/COURSEWORK_PROGRESS.md were updated for GAP-011/report-draft state.
tests/test_report_evidence_links.py is deterministic and marked unit, but its coverage is incomplete as described in the findings.
